welcome.title: Welcome to Life OS
welcome.description: A unified application for comprehensive tracking of life indicators. Keep records of nutrition, workouts, finances and much more.

trackers.title: Trackers
trackers.description: Track water, sleep, mood, body measurements and habits. Set goals and monitor progress.

content.title: Content
content.description: Maintain a library of books and a collection of recipes with automatic calorie calculation.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: All data is stored locally on your device. The application works without internet, and data syncs when the network is available.
